daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Cap. The cosmos is vibing with your grounded nature, inviting you to trust the process even when things feel slow. Something's brewing beneath the surface.
daily.love: Your authentic self is magnetic right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, lean into vulnerability—people are drawn to your realness today. Deep conversations hit different.
daily.career: Your natural hustle is amplified, but don't burn out chasing validation. Focus on tasks that actually matter to you. Small wins compound into something bigger than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest as much as movement. Honor both. A walk, some stretching, or even just sitting with your thoughts will reset your nervous system. Listen to what feels nourishing.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, and the universe is gently suggesting it's time to let people in. Trust the process and your intuition—they're vibing together rn.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings in your direction. Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is your moment to be vulnerable. Real connections happen when you drop the armor. Let someone see the softer version of you.
weekly.career: Your hard work is about to get noticed, but here's the tea: the breakthrough comes from collaboration, not isolation. Share your ideas, ask for input, and watch how doors start opening. You've got the skills—now leverage your network.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and less hustle. This week, prioritize activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Whether it's yoga, long walks, or just sleeping in, your energy will thank you for the intentional care.
